# webDomains

**Instance Property**

Access the web domain activity that contributed to this category’s total activity time.

## Declaration

```swift
var webDomains: DeviceActivityResults<DeviceActivityData.WebDomainActivity> { get }
```

## Accessing contributing activities

- **applications**: Access the application activity that contributed to this category’s total activity time.

items.description: Access the application activity that contributed to this category’s total activity time.
